title: Fix `test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access`
body:
<!-- Thank you for creating a pull request! In general, we merge your pull request after it gets two or more approvals. To proceed to the review process by the maintainers, please make sure that the PR meets the following conditions: (1) it passes all CI checks, and (2) it is neither in the draft nor WIP state. If you wish to discuss the PR in the draft state or need any other help, please mention the Optuna development team in the PR. -->

## Motivation
<!-- Describe your motivation why you will submit this PR. This is useful for reviewers to understand the context of PR. -->

Fix the first problem on #6206. `test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access` is incorrectly dependent on previously executed tests.


## Description of the changes
<!-- Describe the changes in this PR. -->
Reset the logger and set the logging level.

files_modified.patch:
@@ -1141,6 +1141,7 @@ def test_log_completed_trial(capsys: _pytest.capture.CaptureFixture) -> None:
 
 
 def test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access() -> None:
+    logging._reset_library_root_logger()
     study = create_study()
 
     # Create a trial to retrieve it as the `study.best_trial`.
@@ -1149,6 +1150,7 @@ def test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access() -> None:
 
     storage = study._storage
 
+    logging.set_verbosity(logging.INFO)
     with patch.object(storage, "get_best_trial", wraps=storage.get_best_trial) as mock_object:
         study._log_completed_trial(frozen_trial.values, frozen_trial.number, frozen_trial.params)
         assert mock_object.call_count == 1

steps.operation: Stabilize `test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access` by resetting the library root logger and explicitly setting verbosity to INFO before exercising `_log_completed_trial`.
steps.reason: The test was implicitly relying on logger state (handlers/levels) left behind by previously executed tests; resetting the library root logger and forcing a known logging level makes the test deterministic and independent of execution order.
steps.side_effects: May change logging behavior for subsequent tests in the same process if they assume prior verbosity/handlers; however, explicitly resetting and setting verbosity here reduces cross-test coupling and should improve overall suite isolation.

step_plan.summary: Fixes flaky test behavior by making `test_log_completed_trial_skip_storage_access` independent of prior test execution through an explicit logger reset and verbosity configuration.
